## 📋 Pull Request

### Description

Brief description of what this PR does.

### Type of Change

- [ ] 📝 Documentation (new content, fixes, improvements)
- [ ] 💻 Code (scripts, configs, automation examples)
- [ ] 🧪 Lab (hands-on exercise or project)
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (typo, broken link, incorrect info)
- [ ] 🔧 Maintenance (CI/CD, repo structure, tooling)

### Module(s) Affected

- [ ] 01-devops
- [ ] 02-sre
- [ ] 03-aiops
- [ ] cheatsheets
- [ ] interview-prep
- [ ] Other: ___

### Checklist

- [ ] Content follows the [module structure template](./CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Links are valid and point to correct resources
- [ ] Code/scripts have been tested locally
- [ ] Mermaid diagrams render correctly
- [ ] No sensitive data (API keys, passwords) included
- [ ] Spelling and grammar checked

### Screenshots (if applicable)

Add screenshots of rendered Markdown, diagrams, or tool output.

### Related Issues

Closes #(issue number)
